projectDescription: An open-source Python library and CLI tool to decode, encode, validate, and enrich Panama postal codes — with no external dependencies.
keyFeatures: Decode Panama postal codes to precise GPS coordinates (MACRO/MICRO/NANO/PICO levels)
Encode GPS coordinates to postal code bodies
Validate postal code format and geographic bounds (strict or lax)
Lookup postal office (estafeta) name, area, and zone via point-in-polygon against GeoJSON
Lookup political division (province, district, corregimiento, village, neighborhood) locally or via remote API
Interactive and non-interactive CLI with ANSI color output
Zero external dependencies — pure Python stdlib
Hybrid local/remote lookup: uses downloaded GeoJSON files when available, falls back to official API
publicApiSurface: encode(lat: float, lng: float, level: str = 'PICO') -> str
validate(code: str, strict: bool = False) -> bool
is_in_panama(lat: float, lng: float, strict: bool = False) -> bool
DecodedPostal (dataclass: lat, lng, precision_meters, level, estafeta_prefix)
